summary: Verstappen hunts redemption at Spa after consecutive high-speed crashes force Red Bull into a conventional rear wing overhaul, while Lewis Hamilton arrives at Ferrari seeking to build momentum from his breakthrough Spanish victory. Norris absorbs a 10-place grid penalty that reshuffles the title fight and hands Verstappen a golden opportunity to claw back points in a championship that tightens considerably. A dominant Verstappen performance could stabilize Red Bull's recent instability and puncture McLaren's championship assault, while any Ferrari consistency could validate Hamilton's early impact and reshape the constructors' battle.
